display.purpose: All UI type — display, headline, title, body, label. One family, weight carries hierarchy.

label.purpose: Tabular numerics — money, ledger amounts, timestamps. Mono-for-Money Rule.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Resting cards and the login panel.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Card on hover; lifts it off the casing.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Dialog surfaces, isolating them from the 40% gray scrim.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (ease-out-quart feel). No bounce, no elastic.

motion.name: duration
motion.purpose: State transitions: hover, focus, loading, dialog appearance. Range 150–250ms.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single CTA per screen — Signal Violet fill, white label.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; height: 32px; padding: 8px 10px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 10px; background: #7c3aed; color: #ffffff; font: 500 14px/1 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #6d28d9; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(124,58,237,0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action — white fill, Signal Violet border and label.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; height: 32px; padding: 7px 9px; border: 1px solid rgba(167,139,250,0.6); border-radius: 10px; background: #ffffff; color: #7c3aed; font: 500 14px/1 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(124,58,237,0.08); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(124,58,237,0.5); } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-emphasis control — transparent, ink label (logout, dialog cancel).
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; height: 32px; padding: 8px 10px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 10px; background: transparent; color: #0f172a; font: 500 14px/1 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f1f5f9; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(100,116,139,0.4); } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Amount Input
components.description: Money field with R$ prefix, mono tabular value, violet focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 10px; background: #ffffff; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-field:focus-within { border-color: #7c3aed; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(124,58,237,0.2); } .ds-field-prefix { color: #94a3b8; font: 400 14px/1 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field-input { flex: 1; height: 100%; border: 0; outline: none; background: transparent; color: #0f172a; font: 400 14px/1 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-field.ds-field-error { border-color: #f87171; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(239,68,68,0.2); }

components.name: Real Balance Card
components.description: Filled Signal Violet — the only real-money, solid card.
components.css: .ds-card-real { position: relative; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 16px; background: #7c3aed; color: #ffffff; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.07), 0 1px 2px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.07); } .ds-card-tag { font: 600 12px/1 'Geist Mono', monospace; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #ddd6fe; } .ds-card-amt { margin-top: 12px; font: 700 36px/1 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-card-cta { margin-top: 24px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; height: 32px; padding: 8px 10px; border-radius: 10px; background: #ffffff; color: #6d28d9; font: 500 14px/1 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; border: 0; cursor: pointer; }

components.name: Game Balance Card
components.description: Outlined — ring-fenced real money. 2px Signal Violet border.
components.css: .ds-card-game { display: flex; flex-direction: column; border-radius: 16px; border: 2px solid #ddd6fe; background: #ffffff; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-tag { font: 600 12px/1 'Geist Mono', monospace; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #7c3aed; } .ds-card-amt { margin-top: 12px; font: 600 30px/1 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #0f172a; }

components.name: Sandbox Balance Card
components.description: Dashed — not money. No currency symbol, ever.
components.css: .ds-card-sandbox { display: flex; flex-direction: column; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px dashed #cbd5e1; background: #ffffff; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-tag { font: 600 12px/1 'Geist Mono', monospace; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #94a3b8; } .ds-card-amt { margin-top: 12px; font: 600 30px/1 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #334155; }

components.name: Ledger Row
components.description: Statement entry: label + timestamp left, signed mono amount right.
components.html:
• Depósito PIX

    14 jul, 09:32

    +R$ 50,00
components.css: .ds-ledger-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 14px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; } .ds-ledger-type { font: 500 14px/1.3 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #0f172a; } .ds-ledger-time { margin-top: 2px; font: 400 12px/1.3 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #64748b; } .ds-ledger-amt { font: 400 14px/1 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-ledger-in { color: #6d28d9; } .ds-ledger-amt:not(.ds-ledger-in) { color: #475569; }

narrative.overview: CTech Wallet is a calibrated tool. Every screen reads like a precise meter — no flourish, just correct, legible state. Signal Violet is the signal light; cool slate gray is the casing. Nothing decorative fires; state is always legible. The brand personality is sharp, efficient, and confident: terse, data-forward copy and motion that conveys state only — the interface behaves like an instrument, not a salesperson. This system explicitly rejects legacy bank clutter, crypto-bro flash, and gamified casino patterns. The gambling surface appears only on consent and the entry is one quiet link — never a lit banner.
keyCharacteristics: Signal Violet is rare by design — one action color per screen, never a decorative tint.
Surfaces are flat at rest; shadow answers elevation and state, not ambient styling.
Money has explicit semantics: fill, stroke, and dash encode what each balance is.
Bilingual by default — pt-BR primary, English first-class; every label goes through i18n.
Motion is fast (150–250 ms) and state-only; it never decorates.

rules.name: The Signal Violet Rule
rules.body: Signal Violet is the only chromatic accent and it means exactly one thing: this is the action, or this is live. It must never become the dominant color of a screen, never tint a background decoratively, and never appear as more than one primary CTA per view.

rules.name: The Mono-for-Money Rule
rules.body: Every numeric money value — balances, amounts, ledger figures — renders in Geist Mono with tabular-nums. Proportional numerals are forbidden in financial readouts; alignment is part of the instrument feel.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. A shadow is a response to state (hover, elevation, focus-ring adjacent) — never ambient decoration. Glassmorphism and heavy drop shadows are prohibited.

rules.name: The Money-Has-Semantics Rule
rules.body: The three balances are not interchangeable: filled = real, outlined = ring-fenced real, dashed = not money. Never show a currency symbol on sandbox, never fill the game card, never dash the real card.

dos: Reserve Signal Violet for the single primary action and live state per screen (The Signal Violet Rule).
Render the three balances with explicit semantics — filled = real, outlined = ring-fenced real, dashed = not money (The Money-Has-Semantics Rule).
Keep surfaces flat; let shadow answer hover and elevation only (The Flat-By-Default Rule).
Render every money value in Geist Mono tabular-nums (The Mono-for-Money Rule).
Keep transitions at 150–250 ms and state-only; honor prefers-reduced-motion with a crossfade or instant cut.
Write all copy through i18n, pt-BR primary and English first-class.
Hold body text to ≥4.5:1 and use a readable muted placeholder (#94a3b8), never light gray-on-tint.
donts: Use border-left/right greater than 1px as a colored stripe on any card, list item, or alert.
Use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient) — emphasis is weight or size, one solid color.
Use glassmorphism as default; blurs and glass cards are decorative and prohibited.
Build identical icon-plus-heading-plus-text card grids as the page's rhythm.
Put a tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section, or 01/02/03 numbered markers as default scaffolding.
Animate decorative motion, orchestrate page-load sequences, or bounce/elastic.
Invent affordances — standard buttons, dialogs, and form controls only; modals are the last resort, not the first thought.
Let any heading overflow its container at tablet/mobile widths.
Treat the three wallets as interchangeable: never show a currency symbol on sandbox, never fill the game card, never dash the real card.
Drift into legacy bank clutter — no dense gray dashboards, tiny tables, or jargon walls.
Drift into crypto-bro flash — no neon, no volatility theater, no speculative/casino energy, no hype motion.
Drift into gamified casino patterns — no banners, points, streaks, reward loops, or any nudge toward betting; the gambling entry stays one quiet link.
